mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >55% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal income and stable inflation indicates robust consumer purchasing power without monetary policy tightening pressure, driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance with p-value above 0.1 in out-of-sample regression tests.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production during a monetary easing cycle reflects improving corporate output capacity and earnings momentum, generating positive short-term market returns within one week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during easing cycles with negative 5-day forward returns in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts surpassing 900,000 units signal strong construction sector demand and broader economic resilience, forecasting positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >50% of instances when HOUST exceeds the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms genuine labor market recovery rather than statistical artifacts, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to outperform single-proxy baselines by more than 1% annualized alpha.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation during a tightening cycle forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, increasing discount rates and compressing equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns exceed 60% during tightening regimes despite rising CPI readings.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth reflects stronger corporate revenue fundamentals and economic expansion, systematically driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains negative or below 0.01 across all 3-year rolling windows.
